race.name: Midnight Sun Randonnée
race.tagline: Epic 1,215 km randonnée across Scandinavia under 24-hour midnight sun, crossing the Arctic Circle with 14,296 m elevation gain.

vitals.location: Brännland Inn near Umeå, Sweden to Scandic Plaza hotel in Umeå (loop into Norway to Mo i Rana and Norwegian Sea fjords)
vitals.country: Sweden to Scandic Plaza hotel in Umeå (loop into Norway to Mo i Rana and Norwegian Sea fjords)
vitals.registration: 30 EUR non-refundable initial fee; limited spots via reservation

climate.description: Subarctic mid-June: 24-hour midnight sun daylight; headwinds, rain, drizzle, cold climbs, sunny meadows to snowy peaks; dehydration risks.
challenges: headwinds, rain, drizzle, cold climbs, sunny meadows to snowy peaks

terrain.surface: Round-trip loop on asphalt: river valleys/lake shores/fjords; major climbs/descents over snow-capped mountains; Arctic Circle crossing; remote 158 km stretches; some busy traffic.
features: Round-trip loop on asphalt: river valleys/lake shores/fjords

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 83. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 77.

logistics.transport: Fly Umeå Airport (UME); start Brännland Inn, finish Scandic Plaza; parking/taxi from Mo i Rana; book via site; self-supported (carry gear, no e-bikes/bag drop); helmet/lights required.

history.origin_story: Founded ~2021 by Randonneurs Laponia; 5th edition 2026; 2022: ~100 starters June 19 23:07, top in 66+ hrs despite headwinds/rain/snow; PBP 2027 qualifier.

biased_opinion.summary: Midnight Sun Randonnée delivers raw subarctic adventure: crush 1,215 km of fjords/mountains under eternal sun, self-supported through rain/snow/headwinds. PBP ticket for bargain entry. Elite endurance test minus crowds/tech.

final_verdict.one_liner: T2 franchise ultra-randonnée: midnight sun elevation beast with Arctic soul.
